meta.summary: Open-Source PyMOL molecular visualization with command-line/headless use and optional browser-accessible GUI through Xvfb, x11vnc, and noVNC.
meta.description: Open-Source PyMOL molecular visualization with command-line/headless use and optional browser-accessible GUI through Xvfb, x11vnc, and noVNC.

test:
printf 'from pymol import cmd
print("PYMOL_VERSION=" + cmd.get_version()[0])
quit
' > /tmp/taf-pymol-version.py && pymol -c -r /tmp/taf-pymol-version.py 2>&1 | grep -F 'PYMOL_VERSION=3.1.0' >/dev/null

pymol -c -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version 3.1.0' >/dev/null && pymol-gui --help | grep -F 'browser-accessible noVNC session' >/dev/null && ffmpeg -version | grep -F 'ffmpeg version' >/dev/null && python3 -c 'from pymol import movie; assert movie.find_exe("ffmpeg")'
python3 -c 'import pymol, pymol.cmd, Pmw, PyQt5, mmtf'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pymol-render && cd /tmp/taf-pymol-render && printf 'ATOM      1  N   GLY A   1       0.000   0.000   0.000  1.00 20.00           N
ATOM      2  CA  GLY A   1       1.450   0.000   0.000  1.00 20.00           C
ATOM      3  C   GLY A   1       2.000   1.400   0.000  1.00 20.00           C
ATOM      4  O   GLY A   1       1.300   2.350   0.000  1.00 20.00           O
END
' > tiny.pdb && printf 'load tiny.pdb
show sticks
orient
png tiny.png, width=320, height=240, ray=0
quit
' > render.pml && pymol -cq render.pml >/tmp/taf-pymol-render.log 2>&1 && test -s tiny.png

pymol-gui --help >/dev/null && (pymol-gui --geometry 800x600 >/tmp/taf-pymol-gui.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; ok=0; i=0; while [ $i -lt 30 ]; do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:5801/vnc.html >/dev/null; then ok=1; break; fi; i=$((i + 1)); sleep 1; done; kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; test $ok -eq 1 && grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:5801/vnc.html?autoconnect=1&resize=scale' /tmp/taf-pymol-gui.log >/dev/null)

upstream.name: Open-Source PyMOL
upstream.citation: The PyMOL Molecular Graphics System, Version 3.1.0, Schrodinger, LLC.
